Title: Meow or Never
Description: Meow or Never is a small indie game about a cat and a Roomba who are best friends. After moving to a new place, they want to escape from there because they don't like it. Help the two friends escape from there.
Reflection: First  every game project. Only very limited programming skills at this point. I was the only person programming in this project but still pulled off quite some things for the sake of myself but also my team. I was really determined to not fail my team and spent a lot of overtime on this. This experience still is very dear to me because I was struggling with a lot of anxiety and self doubt at this point of my studies because everyone seemed to already have an extensive amount of experience in programming. I pulled it off in the end and felt such a sense of accomplishment that I knew this was definitely the path for me in the future. It is currently the plan to continue working on this with my friends/teammates because the concept itself is interesting and with my added expertise I think I could really improve some beginner errors that I’ve done at the first try.
